// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import java.lang.foreign.*
import java.lang.foreign.ValueLayout.*
import java.lang.invoke.MethodHandle
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, NativeLoader, Scratch, Layouts, StructAbiCheck, UpcallBridge}

final class BorrowedBufferBindingsImpl extends BorrowedBufferBindings:
    import BorrowedBufferBindingsImpl.*

    def mallocChunk(n: Long)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): Ffi.Borrowed[Buffer[Byte]] =
        val __kyoScratch$ = Scratch.currentFor("kyo.example.BorrowedBufferBindings", Scratch.configuredSize)
        val __kyoMark$ = __kyoScratch$.mark()
        try
            val errnoSeg = __kyoScratch$.alloc(4L, 4L, "kyo.example.BorrowedBufferBindings", "mallocChunk")
            val retVal: MemorySegment = mallocChunkMH.invokeExact(errnoSeg, n)
            Ffi.Borrowed.wrap(if retVal.address() == 0L then null else (if (java.lang.System.getProperty("kyo.ffi.checkedBorrows") == "true") Buffer.Unsafe.wrapBorrowedChecked[Byte](retVal.reinterpret(n.toLong * 1L), n.toInt, kyo.ffi.internal.BufferFactory.currentBorrowOwner()) else Buffer.Unsafe.wrapBorrowed[Byte](retVal.reinterpret(n.toLong * 1L), n.toInt)))
        finally __kyoScratch$.reset(__kyoMark$)
end BorrowedBufferBindingsImpl

object BorrowedBufferBindingsImpl:
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.BorrowedBufferBindings")
    private val lib      = NativeLoader.load("kyo_borrowed_buf")
    private val linker   = Linker.nativeLinker()
    private val capture  = Linker.Option.captureCallState("errno")

    private val mallocChunkMH: MethodHandle = linker.downcallHandle(
        lib.find("malloc_chunk").orElseThrow(),
        FunctionDescriptor.of(ADDRESS, JAVA_LONG),
        capture
    )
end BorrowedBufferBindingsImpl
